title: Maria Rambeau/Earth-838
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Captain Marvel {{!}} Earth-838}}
{{CharHub|Captain Marvel|Maria Rambeau}}
{{AltUniverse|[[Earth-838]]|3=Characters}}
{{Character
|name = Captain Marvel
|image = Captain Marvel - Earth-838 Infobox.jpg
|real name = Maria Rambeau

{{Quote|Captain Marvel. Defender of the cosmos.|[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}}
Captain '''Maria Rambeau''' was a founding member of the [[Illuminati]] and the cosmic defender known as '''Captain Marvel'''.

==Biography==
{{MD|Maria Rambeau (Earth-838)}}
===Member of the Illuminati===
====Joining the Illuminati====
Maria Rambeau, who was a very powerful hero infused with [[Kree]] DNA, joined an organization created by [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Strange]]. They coined themselves the [[Illuminati]] which was made up of Strange, [[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]], [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]], [[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]], and [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====[[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]]====
[[File:Captain Carter, Black Bolt & Captain Marvel.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rambeau watches as [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]] prepares for [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Strange]]'s execution]]When [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] waged war, the [[Illuminati]] banded together to stop him, except for [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Strange]], who used the [[Darkhold]] to look for solutions in the [[Multiverse]] by [[Dreamwalking]]. Strange's method was successful, but he continued dreamwalking, which destroyed another universe so he confessed himself to the Illuminati. Strange renounced the Darkhold, and the group found the [[Book of Vishanti]], which they used to defeat Thanos. Rambeau, along her teammates, witnessed the execution of Strange by [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]]. Rambeau, along with the rest of the group, covered up the event, making it seem as Strange was killed in the battle with Thanos, preserving his status as hero.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====An Alternate Strange====
[[File:Maria Rambeau (Illuminati).png|{{AltFloat}}|Rambeau meets an alternate [[Doctor Strange|Strange]]]]
{{Quote|Oh, we can handle your [[Scarlet Witch|little witch]] if she decides to [[Dreamwalking|dreamwalk]].|Captain Marvel to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}}
One day, [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]], who took [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Strange]]'s seat on the [[Illuminati]], arrived with a prisoner: another version of [[Doctor Strange]]. The Illuminati oversaw a trial for Strange as Mordo introduced the group. Strange tried to argue that [[Scarlet Witch]] was threatening the multiverse, but Rambeau arrogantly said that they could handle the witch. [[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]] then said Strange was the biggest threat to the multiverse. [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] arrived and showed Strange what happened to their Strange.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====[[Battle at the Illuminati Headquarters]]====
[[File:Wanda Maximoff vs. Captain Marvel Variant.png|{{AltFloat}}|Captain Marvel firing a photon blast at [[Scarlet Witch]]]]
{{Quote|Get the hell out of my [[Earth-838|universe]]!|Captain Marvel to [[Scarlet Witch]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}}
Suddenly, [[Scarlet Witch]] broke into the [[Illuminati Headquarters]]. Rambeau and the rest of the Illuminati confronted her outside [[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]]'s lab. Rambeau and [[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]] witnessed the murders of [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]] and [[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]] as they decided to attack Maximoff. Rambeau took flight and repeatedly fired powerful photon blasts toward Maximoff that it almost damaged her force field. Rambeau's photon blast was so powerful that it sent both Maximoff and Carter flying into a wall.
[[File:Maria Rambeau Captain Marvel death.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Captain Marvel is crushed to death by the Scarlet Witch]]
Maximoff then eventually lifted a statue and threw it at Rambeau, crashing her into a wall. After the death of Captain Carter, Rambeau rises enraged as she launched toward Maximoff bursting through debris. Rambeau and Maximoff lifted off into the air as Maximoff siphoned off her power and blasted her with a huge wave of energy, sending her flying across the Headquarters and de-powering her. Maximoff took the opportunity to take another statue and slam it on top of Rambeau, crushing her to death.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

==Powers and Abilities==
{{Expand}}
===Powers===
*'''Hybrid Physiology/Cosmic Enhancement''': Maria Rambeau acquired the ability to produce cosmic energies to no measurable bounds and manipulate them to her needs. Rambeau also possessed superhuman strength, speed, endurance, and reflexes.
**'''Superhuman Strength''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Durability''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Speed''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Stamina''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Reflexes''': ''To be added''
**'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': ''To be added''
**'''Cosmic Energy Manipulation''': Rambeau was able to manipulate cosmic energy. She was also able to envelope herself within her energy, which emitted itself as a glowing aura surrounding her in a form known as Binary. In Binary mode, Rambeau became essentially invulnerable and incalculably strong, to the point where she alone held her own against [[Scarlet Witch]], nearly equaling the foe's sheer power; although she was eventually overpowered.
***'''Energy Blast''': [[File:Maria Rambeau vs. Wanda Maximoff.png|thumb|250px|Captain Marvel shooting energy blasts]] Rambeau was able to fashion her cosmic energy into dense powerful photon blasts.
***'''Flight''': While enveloping herself with cosmic energy, Rambeau was able to fly, glide and float through the air without outside help.

===Abilities===

==Facilities==
*'''[[Illuminati Headquarters]]''': As an [[Illuminati]] member, Rambeau is an occasional inhabitant of the headquarters. Like the rest of the Illuminati, she went to the headquarters whenever they scheduled a meeting.
